scope: Add Deployment tactical-preview click drawing mode for segment-scoped sketch lines

Desktop QA only; mobile/cellphone is outside the current target
flow: Reset campaign and opened Theater -> Army Camp -> Deployment.

Verified the third click auto-confirmed the sketch line, exited drawing mode, showed 形状3点, rendered one saved overlay polyline, and showed 計画セット保存時に戦線形状 1線を含める。
Verified the saved plan-set row included 形状1線.
Opened 内容確認 and verified 保存戦線形状 森林左翼線 3点 plus the clicked coordinate preview X78 Y10 -> X28 Y88 -> X96 Y48.
notes: This is click-to-place 3-point drawing on the Deployment tactical preview. It is not yet drag/freehand curve editing.
The existing button presets remain available as quick shape commands.
